TaskFactory.description: Deploys tasks. Use createTaskWithTokens to schedule automation.

methods.name: createTaskWithTokens
methods.description: Creates a task with ERC20 token deposits

inputs.name: actions
inputs.description: adapter operations to execute. target, selector, data, protocol

inputs.name: deposits
inputs.description: token address and amount to deposit

TimeBasedTransferAdapter.description: Adapter for scheduling a token transfer after a specific timestamp.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes the transfer if the timestamp has passed

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: abi.encode(address token, uint256 amount, uint256 executeAfter, address recipient)

tools.name: webSearch
tools.description: Searches the web for missing parameters (e.g. token addresses, protocols on Arc Testnet).

tools.name: createTask
tools.description: Formulates the transaction payload and calls createTaskWithTokens.
